No appearance on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT PAUL KELLUS'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions is Granted.
NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. Order signed. Judge Pro-tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kristin E. Charbonnier, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6838, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PAUL KELLUS Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Within ten days of entry of the Court's order granting the motion, Plaintiff shall pay sanctions in the amount of $674.65 to Defendant. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
